data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. VEINS WITHIN ROCK won his maiden race by a huge margin of nine lengths last start over 1600m at Launceston as the favourite after taking over the lead into the turn. Jett Stanley was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the ride. Will jump as the favourite and can go back-to-back. 10. SOUTH GEORGIA only finished sixth of 13 over 1600m at Launceston last start but having placed second of 10 here two runs back is worth another chance. 11. STAR PERFORMER recorded a strong maiden win at long odds over 2100m at Launceston last time after coming home well from fifth of seven into the turn. Looks well placed and is a must include in exotic bets. 12. THEM'S THE BREAKS did well to place fifth of nine over 1400m at Launceston last start after she made a poor beginning. She has placed in three of five runs this prep and can't be overlooked.","runners":[4,10,11,12],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: HOBART-R4-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
